title: Daily Briefing — Apr 24
headline: Flows strong, volatility muted, but tech wobble = caution zone.
body: Right, big picture: the market’s grinding higher with SPY at $708.45, daily closes well above the 20 MA ($677.54) and breadth holding up. Despite some lumps in mega-cap tech (MSFT -4.0%, NVDA -1.4%), we’re in a ‘greed but not peak greed’ environment — Fear & Greed at 66.7, just shy of the danger zone, and VIX is trending comfortably below the SMA20 (18.63 vs 21.57). Patience, react, don’t predict.

Sector rotation is classic mean reversion: Energy (XLE $56.98) and Industrials (XLI $174.07) leading with low risk, while Utilities (XLU $46.09) and Real Estate (XLRE $43.96) are both triggered and showing momentum. Tech’s still ‘approaching’ but faces near-term whipsaws — watch that XLK $155.84 vs 20 MA ($143.39) zone. The canary (XLF $51.80) is improving, so the economy isn’t dead yet.

Contrarian signals: mega-cap retail crowding (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, AMZN) into highs is always worth a side eye. Nothing in the press that isn’t already priced, but MSFT’s 4% drop and that cluster of bear signals in healthcare (TMO -9.2%, DHR -3.0%) is mental. No bond breakdown (HYG/LQD strong), but keep one hand on the exit if that changes. Less trades = more wins.
callout_body:
SPY: $677.54 (20 MA support) — above, bullish bias
MSFT: Watching $389.04 (20 MA) for reversal opportunity
NVDA: $186.53 (20 MA) is the pivot, $199.64 near resistance
XLK: Hold $143.39 (20 MA); sector rotation strong
XLE: Confirm $58.13 (20 MA) breakdown for energy risk
XLU, XLRE: Triggered, valid for momentum rotation
VIX: 18.63 — fading volatility
Fear & Greed: 66.7 — not extreme, but watch for push toward 75
action_items: Hold longs in indices/leading sectors (SPY, XLU, XLI, XLRE) while above 20 MA; rotate out if breakdown occurs
Watch MSFT, NVDA, and Tech for bounce off the 20 MA; don’t chase, react to flows at support
closing_quote: If bonds freak out, everything breaks. Until then, abundance mindset: next trade.
